change: Use BtCursor::rowid_and_payload_cow in reload_memdb_rows_from_txn_preserving_schema to avoid separate rowid and payload cell parses.
artifact_policy: Raw perf.data files were retained in the temp worktree and not published; concise perf report tops plus benchmark JSON/stdout/stderr are published.

commands.build: env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target-azurepine-prof-e5df CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PERF_DEBUG=true CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_PERF_STRIP=false RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo build --profile release-perf -p fsqlite-e2e --bin comprehensive-bench
commands.clippy: env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_azurepine_reload_cow rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fsqlite-core --all-targets -- -D warnings

verification: env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_azurepine_reload_cow rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fsqlite-core --all-targets -- -D warnings
